## Ducky Image Challenge

<img width="70%" alt="To reflect like me is to be like me. But you are you, not a reflection of yourself. To understand my essence, you must listen first and speak last. Your test has already begun." src=".github/images/ducky-reflect-quote.png" />

Shape the three guides into view.

**Edit this comment** by replacing each `HIDDEN` value in the **Character Slots** list below with a single HTML image tag using:

- `width="20%"`
- `alt="ducky"`, `alt="mona"`, and `alt="copilot"`
- the matching intro image from this repository as the `src`

 Images references to use are shown below:

`{{ repo_image_base_url }}/ducky-intro.png`
`{{ repo_image_base_url }}/mona-intro.png`
`{{ repo_image_base_url }}/copilot-intro.png`

Example format for one image:

`<img width="20%" alt="example-name" src="https://example.com/example.png" />`

### Character Slots

- Character 1: PLACE-IMAGE-HERE
- Character 2: PLACE-IMAGE-HERE
- Character 3: PLACE-IMAGE-HERE

<details>
<summary>Having trouble? 🤷</summary><br/>

> - 💡 **Tip:** Use one image tag per line.
> - 💡 **Tip:** Pay close attention to the width and alt text requirements.

</details>
